_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: Hey XPEL... everyone at the gym keeps talking about you. What's your deal?

frame.MrWilly_pose: standing centered, arms relaxed at sides, one hand beginning to point down toward table
frame.MrWilly_expression: curious, one eyebrow raised, slight smirk, friendly challenge
frame.camera_angle: slight low angle, wide shot, table visible in foreground bottom left

camera_motion.movement: slow intentional push in toward MrWilly

character_motion.MrWilly: one full natural breath cycle, chest rises and falls, slight weight shift to left foot, right hand lifts slightly, head tilts 5 degrees left, single natural eye blink
